concepts.Microaneurysms: Small microaneurysm-like activations support diabetic retinal change.
concepts.Hemorrhages: Hemorrhage-like regions increase suspicion for diabetic retinopathy.
concepts.Hard exudates: Exudate-like activations are consistent with diabetic retinal pathology.

concepts.Media opacity: Diffuse low-quality or opacity-related evidence supports a media-hazy interpretation.

concepts.Macular changes: Macular-region changes support a myopic retinopathy hypothesis.

concepts.Optic disc pallor: Optic-disc pallor evidence supports optic-disc disorder.
